Drag any sidebar row into the Canvas to open it as a panel
⌘E opens the selected agent or panel in big mode
⌘D toggles dense panels — gaps collapse and terminals get the whole stage
⌘⏎ in the branch step starts the agent in an isolated git worktree
Fork a conversation from an agent's ⋯ menu to try two approaches in parallel
⌘⇧N schedules an agent for later — try 1h, 6pm, or tomorrow 9am
Drag a Canvas tab out of the strip to pop it into its own window
Save a Canvas layout as a template, then spawn it into any folder
Click a repo name in the sidebar to filter the wall to that repo
Type / in a schedule prompt to autocomplete your Claude skills
Open any markdown file as a Kanban board from the repo menu's Views
Double-click an agent's title to rename it
Drop files from your file manager onto a file tree to move them into the repo
⌘F searches file names and contents across a repo
⌥1, ⌥2 and ⌥3 switch between Overview, Attention, and Canvas
⌘W closes the focused panel in Canvas, Overview, or big mode
Every shortcut is rebindable in Settings → Shortcuts
